overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character walking along a dramatic coastal cliff path during golden hour. The scene features rocky cliffs, crashing ocean waves, wooden barriers, and distant structures under a dynamic partly cloudy sky, rendered in high-fidelity game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal cliff path with tall dry grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path with a large cliff wall on the left and open ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the path
calm ocean water visible beyond the coastal path
patches of dry golden-brown tall grass growing along the path edge
large rock outcroppings and islands visible in the distance across the water
tall thin tower-like structures visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open coastal path during golden hour, with a massive cliff face to the left and the ocean visible to the right. Dry tall grass lines the path edge, and distant rock formations and towers are visible on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path with wooden debris and distant observers

events.description: distant figures in red clothing become visible standing near the water's edge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path while approaching wooden crates and barriers, with distant figures now visible near the shoreline

notable_agents.action: two figures in red clothing standing near the water's edge in the distance

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and debris scattered along the right side of the path
rough wooden posts and barriers lining the path edge
ocean waves breaking against the rocks along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, wooden crates and rough barriers appear along the right side of the path. In the distance, two figures in red clothing stand near the water's edge, and waves crash against the rocks below the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow coastal path with wooden fence barrier

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated coastal path with a wooden fence on the right side and waves crashing below

entered.detail: continuous wooden fence made of vertical posts running along the right edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows with a continuous wooden fence on the right side separating the walkway from the drop to the ocean below. The cliff face on the left recedes slightly into the mid-ground as the character walks along this elevated coastal section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal overlook approaching distant structures

events.description: large black bird flies past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the fenced path as the landscape opens up, with a bird flying past

notable_agents.action: large black bird flying past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large rock outcroppings becoming visible again as the path curves

segments.scene_description: The wooden fence ends and the path opens into a wider coastal overlook. A large black bird flies past the camera from right to left. The cliff face now appears further in the distance to the left, and distant rock formations become visible again as the character approaches the end of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dramatic coastal path that transitions from an open cliffside walk into a narrow fenced walkway and finally opens into a wide overlook. It begins with the character walking between a massive cliff face and the ocean, where dry tall grass lines the path under a partly cloudy golden hour sky. As the character progresses, the environment shifts to include wooden crates and rough barriers on the right, while waves crash against the rocks below and distant figures in red appear by the water's edge. The scene then narrows as a continuous wooden fence emerges to separate the walkway from the drop, causing the cliff face to recede into the mid-ground. Finally, the fence ends and the path expands into a broad overlook where a large black bird flies across the frame as distant rock formations reappear on the horizon.
